name: Eerie Predictions
text:
At the start of the status phase: You may look at the top card of any 1 deck; place that card on the top or bottom of that deck. 
Then, return this card to the Uydai player.

name: Death Binding
text: When the Pharad'n player passes, remove 4 of your infantry from the game board to gain 1 technology with no prerequisites. Then, return this card to the Pharad'n player; that player captures 1 infantry from the supply.

name: Alloy Shipments
text: At the start of a round of combat: Choose up to 3 of your units; during this round of combat, hits those units produce cannot be canceled. After this round of combat, return this card to the Qhet player.
notes: This means that SUSTAIN DAMAGE cannot be used against these hits.

name: Tri-Weave Shielding
text: At the start of invasion: Choose 1 unit you control in the active system; that unit gains PLANETARY SHIELD until the end of this action. Then, return this card to the Atokera player.

name: Kaltrim Ambassadors
text: At the start of the agenda phase: Place 1 infantry from the Kaltrim player's reinforcements into coexistence on a planet you control to look at the top card of the agenda deck, you may discard that card. Then, return this card to the Kaltrim player.

name: Plunderers
text: When you receive this card, if you are not the Sarcosa player, you must place it face up in your play area. When you win a combat, give this card to your opponent and take up to 2 of their trade goods or commodities. Then, the Sarcosa player gains 1 commodity.

name: Statecraft Mentor
text: When you would return another player's promissory note to that player: You may return this promissory note instead of that promissory note. You can use this ability even if you are the Xin player. Then, the Xin player may place 1 ground force from their reinforcements into coexistence on a planet you control.

name: Mercenary Sortie
text: At the start of combat: Roll 3 dice, for each result of 8 or greater, destroy up to 1 of your opponent's fighters or infantry participating in that combat. After the first round of this combat, return this card to the Belkosea player.

name: Concordat Allegiant
text: ACTION: Place this card face up in your play area. Once per action, when you win a combat against a player with more victory points than you, gain 3 commodities. You must spend 1 token from your fleet pool and return this card to the Toldar player to activate a system that contains that player's units.
